prestazioni: Engine: PSA EP6FDT (1.6L Turbo PureTech, 225 HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 400+ HP reliably. Stock turbo replaced with a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing for optimized spool and top-end flow, paired with a PTP 3.5" stainless downpipe and a custom 3.5" cat-back exhaust system by Milltek Sport with quad 100mm titanium tips.

Fuel System: Upgraded to a Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a custom fuel rail by Radium Engineering. ECU flashed with a custom DynoTune Stage 2+ map optimized for E85 blend (85% ethanol) with a flex-fuel sensor by Continental for real-time ethanol content adjustment.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, custom valving for the 508 SW GT’s 1,500kg+ weight, and adjustable top mounts for camber/caster tuning. Front sway bar upgraded to a 25mm adjustable Whiteline unit, rear sway bar to 22mm, and poly bushings by SuperPro (part #SPF0115) for subframe and control arms. Brembo GT 6-piston 380mm front calipers with 36mm thick two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for aggressive street/track braking.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS) adapted for the 508 SW GT’s wagon body, including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust cutouts. Front splitter by Varis Japan with adjustable canards, and a custom carbon fiber roof by Seibon Carbon for weight reduction.

Wheels & Stance: BBS LM-R 9.5x19" ET35 front and 10.5x19" ET40 rear wheels with custom offsets to fill the fenders, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear). Air Lift Performance 3P management with custom strut mounts for a static 30mm drop with adjustable ride height.

Interior & Details: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Katzkin, including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro Sportster CS seats with custom embroidery (Peugeot Sport logos). Custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with integrated harness bar for 4-point Schroth Profi II harnesses. Digital dash upgrade to a Motec C127 with custom Peugeot-themed layout, and a custom center console housing a 10.1" Android Auto head unit by Pioneer (SPH-DA230DAB) with a JL Audio Stealthbox subwoofer.
